news.t: $100,000 Awarded to New Jersey Organizations Through American Water Charitable Foundation 2024 Workforce Readiness Grant Program

overview.description: The Innovator Premium Income 30 Barrier ETF - January (JANJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a consistent income stream and a limited protective barrier against losses over a one-year period. The actively managed fund holds a package of S&P 500 FLEX options and US Treasurys. JANJ was launched on Dec 31, 2023 and is issued by Innovator.

data.text: CAMDEN, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--New Jersey American Water announced today that four New Jersey organizations — Boys and Girls Clubs of Union County, Hopeworks, Junior Achievement of New Jersey and Sale...
